heading: From the Management Console:
body:
- Click **Configure Identity Providers**.

- If you do not have any Identity Providers configured yet, click
  **Setup Identity Provider**. Otherwise, on the
  **Identity Providers** screen, click
  **Add Identity Provider**.

- Enter or select the following SAML (Security Assertion Markup Language) Protocol Settings.

  | Field                        | Necessity | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
  | ---------------------------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
  | Configuration Name           | Required  | Human-readable label that identifies this configuration.                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
  | Configuration Description    | Optional  | Human-readable label that describes this configuration.                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
  | IdP Issuer URI               | Required  | Identifier for the issuer of the SAML Assertion.Specify a placeholder value for this field. Obtain the real value for this field from your IdP (Identity Provider) once you have supplied it with the Atlas metadata.                                                     |
  | IdP Single Sign-On URL       | Required  | URL of the receiver of the SAML (Security Assertion Markup Language) AuthNRequest.Specify a placeholder value for this field. Obtain the real value for this field from your IdP (Identity Provider) once you have supplied it with the Atlas metadata.                   |
  | IdP Signature Certificate    | Required  | PEM (Privacy Enhanced Mail)-encoded public key certificate of the IdP (Identity Provider). You can obtain this value from your IdP (Identity Provider).You can either:Upload the certificate from your computer, orPaste the contents of the certificate into a text box. |
  | Request Binding              | Required  | SAML (Security Assertion Markup Language) Authentication Request Protocol binding used to send the AuthNRequest. Can be either:HTTP POSTHTTP REDIRECT                                                                                                                     |
  | Response Signature Algorithm | Required  | Response algorithm used to sign the SAML (Security Assertion Markup Language) AuthNRequest. Can be either:SHA-256SHA-1                                                                                                                                                    |

- Click **Next**.
